ValidationRule.description: Required fields when adding FTS owner that creates a billing onboarding for Webinar
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.Username ='engineering@mybrightwheel.com'), NOT($User.ProfileId ='00e1I000001rqxt'), NOT(ISBLANK(FTS_Owner__c)), Declined_Billing_Training__c = FALSE, ISPICKVAL(Billing_Setup_Call_Path__c, 'Webinar'), OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(Billing_Setup_Call_Path__c)), ISBLANK(Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(Billing_Timeline__c)), ISBLANK(Billing_Intervals__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(Subsidy_Tracking__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(Uses_Attendance_or_Variable_Rate_Billing__c)), ISBLANK(Why_BW_Billing__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please complete all fields in the 'Billing Handoff' section
